input: Our AI tool performs CV screening and applicant tracking, ranks candidates, and supports the hiring decision for our enterprise customers.

expected.notes: Annex III.4(a) — recruitment and selection of natural persons (analyse and filter job applications, evaluate candidates). Lexicon hits on 'cv screening', 'applicant tracking', 'candidate ranking', 'hiring decision'. EUR-Lex Annex III paragraph 4(a).
